ASBA
sentence_window:
Abridged prospectus
193. (1)The abridged prospectus shall contain the disclosures as specified in Part B of Schedule
VIII and shall not contain any matter extraneous to the contents of the offer document. (2) Every application form distributed by the issuer or any other person in relation to an issue
shall be accompanied by a copy of the abridged prospectus.
76

--- PAGE 77 ---
ASBA 194. The issuer shall accept bids using only the ASBA facility in the manner specified by the
Board.
